name: Ancient Gear Duel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古代の機械競闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンティーク・ギアデュエル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: "Ancient Gear Golem", and monsters that mention it, in your Monster Zone are unaffected by your opponent's activated monster effects. If your opponent controls a monster: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster that mentions "Ancient Gear Golem" from your Extra Deck, by banishing monsters from your field or GY as material, including "Ancient Gear Golem" you control, and if you do, it can make up to 3 attacks during each Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Duel" once per turn.
eff: "Ancient Gear Golem", and monsters that mention it, in your Monster Zone are unaffected by your opponent's activated monster effects. If your opponent controls a monster: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster that mentions "Ancient Gear Golem" from your Extra Deck, by banishing monsters from your field or GY as material, including "Ancient Gear Golem" you control, and if you do, it can make up to 3 attacks during each Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Ancient Gear Duel" once per turn.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's Monster Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
